Key Features & Details: Powers the single-page application structure, state management (hooks), and modal transitions.
Provides compile-time type checking to prevent layout and state bugs.
Tailors standard utility styles, smooth CSS transitions, responsive spacing, and premium color grids.
High-quality vector SVG icons used across navigation, dashboard metrics, and control cards.
Renders monthly expense areas, pie charts, and inventory stock bars.
Exposes REST endpoints (/api/inventory, /api/shopping-list, /api/agent) and hosts production build assets.
Relational local database storing pantry items, shopping lists, and past receipt purchases.
Generates customized PDF invoice lists, fallback layout spacing, and mixed Telugu/English text elements.
Custom Unicode font loaded dynamically by PDFKit to draw Telugu script correctly without tofu characters.
Transcribes scanned bill receipt photos (OCR) and maps voice coordinates to inventory actions.
Browser native SpeechRecognition (voice input) and SpeechSynthesis (text-to-speech feedback).
Roots package dependency scripts allowing unified compilation, installation, and startup.
Handles automatic GitHub redeployments, volume disk mounting, and secure HTTPS configuration.
